evals.prompt: I have a web app using ZXing-js (@zxing/library + @zxing/browser) to continuously scan multiple barcodes by re-decoding the video feed and collecting distinct values. I want to replace it with Scandit MatrixScan Batch so all visible barcodes are tracked at once. It needs to keep reading EAN-13, UPC-A, Code 128, and QR. Here is the scanner: zxing-scanner.ts.
evals.expected_output: The skill removes the ZXing-js APIs (BrowserMultiFormatReader, decodeFromVideoDevice, BarcodeFormat/DecodeHintType hints, the <video> element) and replaces them with MatrixScan Batch: DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey, BarcodeBatchSettings with EAN13UPCA + Code128 + QR, BarcodeBatch.forContext, a DataCaptureView, a BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay, and an IBarcodeBatchListener.didUpdateSession that iterates session.addedTrackedBarcodes. The ScannedBarcode interface and the dedupe/accumulate logic are preserved (dedupe moved to the tracking identifier). It maps ZXing BarcodeFormat to the correct web Symbology values, flags COOP/COEP as a new requirement, and shows a summary.

assertions.text: The @zxing/library and @zxing/browser imports are NOT present in the migrated code block (may appear in a before/after summary)
BrowserMultiFormatReader is NOT instantiated in the migrated code block (may appear in a summary table)
decodeFromVideoDevice is NOT called in the migrated code block
DecodeHintType and the POSSIBLE_FORMATS hint configuration are NOT present in the migrated code block
DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey( is used to create the context
BarcodeBatchSettings is created with new BarcodeBatchSettings()
await BarcodeBatch.forContext( is used as the async factory
Symbology.EAN13UPCA is enabled (mapped from BarcodeFormat.EAN_13 and BarcodeFormat.UPC_A)
Symbology.Code128 is enabled (mapped from BarcodeFormat.CODE_128)
Symbology.QR is enabled (mapped from BarcodeFormat.QR_CODE — not Symbology.QrCode, which does not exist on web)
Symbology.QrCode does NOT appear as a Symbology enum value in the migrated code (the deprecated/nonexistent web casing is not used)
A DataCaptureView is created (DataCaptureView.forContext or new DataCaptureView) and connectToElement is called
BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay is created (withBarcodeBatchForView or withBarcodeBatchForViewWithStyle)
didUpdateSession is implemented on a BarcodeBatch listener
session.addedTrackedBarcodes is iterated for the new-this-frame barcodes (semantic)
trackedBarcode.barcode.data is read for the scanned value (replacing result.getText()) (semantic)
The ScannedBarcode interface (or equivalent data model) is preserved
Deduplication is preserved and keyed on the tracking identifier (trackedBarcode.identifier) instead of a Set of strings (semantic)
Cross-origin isolation (COOP/COEP) headers are flagged as a new requirement that ZXing-js did not need (semantic)
Setup checklist mentions installing @scandit/web-datacapture-core and @scandit/web-datacapture-barcode
A summary of changes is shown describing what was removed (ZXing) and what was added (BarcodeBatch) (semantic)
